narrative:
Precinct Loudon North (precinct in Seneca County) has 994 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.5 percentage points.
